bio_body:
I'm a data analyst based in Chicago with a background in operations and a drive to make healthcare data actually useful. I came up through mailroom operations at EMS Management & Consultants, where I started automating manual processes with Excel VBA before anyone asked me to — because I saw the inefficiency and couldn't leave it alone.

Today I build dashboards, clean messy datasets, and find the story inside the numbers. My tools are SQL, Python, Power BI, Tableau, and Excel. My goal is a Healthcare Data Analyst or Operations Performance Analyst role where the work actually moves the needle for patients and organizations.
